Basketball Court Flooring

Professional maple hardwood & synthetic PVC systems with superior ball response and player safety.

Fitness
Gym & Fitness

Gym & Fitness Flooring

Heavy-duty rubber and foam flooring built for intense workouts, heavy equipment, and maximum noise reduction.

  • Impact Resistant
  • Sound Dampening
  • Interlocking
  • Easy Clean
Indoor
Indoor Courts

Badminton Court Flooring

BWF-compliant PVC & wooden flooring with exceptional traction for high-speed movements.

  • BWF Standard
  • Enhanced Grip
  • Joint-Friendly

Outdoor
Athletics

Running Track Surfaces

IAAF-certified synthetic rubber tracks providing perfect cushioning and energy return for elite athletes.

  • IAAF Certified
  • All-Weather
  • UV Protected
  • Spike Resistant
Outdoor
Turf & Grass

Artificial Grass & Turf

FIFA-quality synthetic grass for football, cricket, and multi-purpose outdoor sports fields.

  • FIFA Quality
  • Evergreen
  • Fast Drainage
  • Child Safe
Specialised
Combat Sports

Martial Arts & Combat Mats

Why Choose Mian Sports Flooring

BUILT FOR CHAMPIONS

We've spent 10 years perfecting our craft, delivering flooring solutions that professionals trust and athletes love.

  • 🏅
    International Standard Materials
    ISO-certified, FIBA, BWF, IAAF, and FIFA approved flooring systems.
  • ⚡
    Performance-Engineered Design
    Advanced shock absorption and energy return increases athletic performance.
  • 🛡️
    15-Year Warranty
    Industry-leading warranty backed by our confidence in every installation.
  • 🎨
    Custom Branding & Colors
    Unlimited design options — your court, your colours, your identity.
  • 🔧
    Expert Installation Team
    50+ certified professionals ensuring flawless execution every time.
